languages.text: "Несущие Слово не отступали перед угрозами куда большими, чем горстка смертных. Мои слуги сокрушат тебя, а останки пустят на украшение идолов, что славят истинных богов".

traits.locale_text: "Несущие Слово не отступали перед лицом опасностей куда больших, чем горстка смертных. Мои слуги сокрушат тебя, а остатки пустят на украшение идолов, что славят истинных богов".
"Несущие Слово не отступали перед угрозами куда большими, чем горстка смертных. Мои слуги сокрушат тебя, а останки пустят на украшение идолов, что славят истинных богов".

languages.text: "Word Bearers have refused to back down against threats far greater than a handful of mortals. My servants will crush you and use what is left to decorate idols honouring the true gods."
languages.original_text: "Несущие Слово не отступали перед угрозами куда большими, чем горстка смертных. Мои слуги сокрушат тебя, а останки пустят на украшение идолов, что славят истинных богов".

traits.locale_text: "Word Bearers refused to back from the threats far greater than a ragtag bunch of mortals. My servants will crush you and use what is left to decorate idols honoring the true gods."
"Word Bearers refused to back from the threats far greater than a ragtag bunch of mortals. My servants will crush you and use what is left to decorate idols honoring the true gods."
"Word Bearers have refused to back down against threats far greater than a handful of mortals. My servants will crush you and use what is left to decorate idols honouring the true gods."
"Word Bearers have refused to back down against threats far greater than a handful of mortals. My servants will crush you and use what is left to decorate idols honouring the true gods."
"Word Bearers have refused to back down against threats far greater than a handful of mortals. My servants will crush you and use what is left to decorate idols honouring the true gods."

languages.text: "Die Wortträger haben sich geweigert, vor einer Bedrohung zurückzuschrecken, die weit größer ist als eine Handvoll Sterblicher. Meine Diener werden euch zerschmettern und mit dem, was übrig bleibt, Götzenbilder zu Ehren der wahren Götter schmücken."
languages.original_text: "Word Bearers have refused to back down against threats far greater than a handful of mortals. My servants will crush you and use what is left to decorate idols honouring the true gods."

traits.locale_text: "Die Wortträger haben sich geweigert, vor einer Bedrohung zurückzuschrecken, die weit größer ist als eine Handvoll Sterblicher. Meine Diener werden euch zerschmettern und mit dem, was übrig bleibt, Götzenbilder zu Ehren der wahren Götter schmücken."

languages.text: "Les Word Bearers ont refusé de reculer devant des menaces bien plus grandes qu'une poignée de mortels. Mes serviteurs vous écraseront et utiliseront ce qui restera pour décorer des idoles en l'honneur des vrais dieux."
languages.original_text: "Word Bearers have refused to back down against threats far greater than a handful of mortals. My servants will crush you and use what is left to decorate idols honouring the true gods."

traits.locale_text: "Les Word Bearers ont refusé de reculer devant des menaces bien plus grandes qu'une poignée de mortels. Mes serviteurs vous écraseront et utiliseront ce qui restera pour décorer des idoles en l'honneur des vrais dieux."

languages.text: "Los Portadores de la Palabra se han negado a retroceder ante amenazas mucho mayores que un puñado de mortales. Mis siervos os aplastarán y utilizarán lo que quede para decorar ídolos que honren a los verdaderos dioses".
languages.original_text: "Word Bearers have refused to back down against threats far greater than a handful of mortals. My servants will crush you and use what is left to decorate idols honouring the true gods."

traits.locale_text: "Los Portadores de la Palabra se han negado a retroceder ante amenazas mucho mayores que un puñado de mortales. Mis siervos os aplastarán y utilizarán lo que quede para decorar ídolos que honren a los verdaderos dioses".

languages.text: "Söz Taşıyıcıları bir avuç ölümlüden çok daha büyük tehditlere karşı geri adım atmayı reddettiler. Hizmetkârlarım sizi ezecek ve geriye kalanları gerçek tanrıları onurlandıran putları süslemek için kullanacak."
languages.original_text: "Word Bearers have refused to back down against threats far greater than a handful of mortals. My servants will crush you and use what is left to decorate idols honouring the true gods."

traits.locale_text: "Söz Taşıyıcıları bir avuç ölümlüden çok daha büyük tehditlere karşı geri adım atmayı reddettiler. Hizmetkârlarım sizi ezecek ve geriye kalanları gerçek tanrıları onurlandıran putları süslemek için kullanacak."
